entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop evaluated for hybrid seed production in Eastern Africa and India

entities.name: TOPCROSS HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids created by crossing an inbred male-sterile seed parent with an open-pollinated variety restorer

entities.name: COMMERCIAL SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The business of producing and selling hybrid seeds to farmers

entities.name: ICMV 221
entities.description: A widely adapted variety of pearl millet used to create topcross hybrids

entities.description: A country in Eastern Africa where topcross hybrids were evaluated for field performance

entities.description: A country in Eastern Africa where topcross hybrids were evaluated for field performance

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: A country in Eastern Africa where topcross hybrids were evaluated for field performance

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where topcross hybrids were evaluated for heterosis and terminal drought tolerance

entities.name: FIELD PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall growth and yield characteristics of the hybrids in the field

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The phenomenon where hybrid offspring exhibit superior traits compared to their parents

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to maintain productivity under drought stress at the end of the growing season

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biological mass of the plant

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the produced grains

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress occurring at the end of the crop growth cycle

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by rainfall during the growing period
